message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam participantStyle rectangle

participant "Admin" as Admin
participant "Webhook Server" as WebhookServer
participant "Consumer" as Consumer

== Register webhook ==

Admin -> WebhookServer: 1 Register webhook consumer
activate WebhookServer
WebhookServer --> Admin: 2 OK
deactivate WebhookServer

== Event received ==

Admin -> WebhookServer: 3 Event
activate WebhookServer
WebhookServer -> WebhookServer: 4 Store event in DB
deactivate WebhookServer

== Consumer connected ==

Consumer -> WebhookServer: 5 Connect over WS
activate WebhookServer

loop
    WebhookServer -> WebhookServer: 6 Load webhooks from DB
    WebhookServer -> Consumer: 7 Forward forwarding events
end

loop
    Consumer --x WebhookServer: 8 Ack messages by webhook ID
end

deactivate WebhookServer

@enduml
```
